mapper.select: SELECT profile_visibility FROM auth.user_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social.user_follows (follower_user_id, following_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, #{status}, #{now}, #{now}, NULL) ON CONFLICT (follower_user_id, following_user_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at, deleted_at = NULL
mapper.select: SELECT follow.follower_user_id, profile.display_name, profile.profile_image_url, follow.created_at FROM social.user_follows follow JOIN auth.user_profiles profile ON profile.user_id = follow.follower_user_id WHERE follow.following_user_id = #{followingId} AND follow.status = 'PENDING' AND follow.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY follow.created_at DESC, follow.follower_user_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social.user_follows WHERE following_user_id = #{followingId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND deleted_at IS NULL
